items.title: Strategy Summit 2026: Inventive Strategy and the ‘Unbossed’ Organization
items.summary: As AI takes hold of the business world, is long-term competitive advantage a thing of the past? In this four-part special series, we'll share conversations from the recent HBR Strategy Summit to help you get ahead. In this episode, Columbia Business School professor Rita McGrath explains how she thinks companies must adapt when they can no longer depend on their competitive advantage lasting. She explains the most important strategic decision an organization can make today, and what it looks lik

items.title: What's happening with Iran-US 'talks'?
items.summary: Diplomatic efforts to end the war in Iran are accelerating. Proposals are being exchanged through Pakistan, though Iran denies direct talks with the US. Iran's demands include an end to aggression and financial compensation. The US seeks Iran's nuclear disarmament and missile program limits. Both sides need to claim victory for a deal. The conflict's outcome remains uncertain.

items.title: Netflix Raises Prices Again—Here Are The New Rates
items.summary: The increase marks the latest price hike since the streamer upped subscription costs in January 2025.

items.title: Deregulating Big American Banks Makes Them Riskier
items.summary: Deregulating banks does not make them bigger lenders but does make them riskier to the financial system and American consumers.

items.title: Grok Misidentifies Druski’s Erika Kirk Spoof As The Real Person
